datasets.name: MedQuAD
datasets.description: Medical Question-Answering Dataset from NIH — 47,457 QA pairs across 12 NIH websites covering diseases, drugs, and treatments.

datasets.name: PubMedQA
datasets.description: Biomedical research QA dataset built from PubMed abstracts — 1,000 expert-annotated QA pairs (PQA-L) + 211,269 artificially generated.

datasets.name: BioASQ
datasets.description: Large-scale biomedical semantic indexing and QA — requires BioASQ registration.
datasets.manual_instructions: Register at https://bioasq.org/ → Task B → Download training data JSON files → place in data/datasets/bioasq/

datasets.name: HealthSearchQA
datasets.description: 3,173 health questions curated from consumer search queries — Apple Research dataset.

datasets.name: MedMCQA
datasets.description: Large-scale MCQ dataset covering 2,400+ medical subjects from USMLE/AIIMS — 194,000+ questions.

datasets.name: MIMIC-IV
datasets.description: De-identified EHR data from Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center — requires PhysioNet credentialed access and CITI training.
datasets.manual_instructions:
1. Complete CITI 'Data or Specimens Only Research' course
2. Register at https://physionet.org/
3. Request access to MIMIC-IV
4. Download via: wget -r -N -c -np --user <username> --ask-password https://physionet.org/files/mimiciv/2.2/
5. Place hosp/ and icu/ folders in data/datasets/mimic_iv/

datasets.name: MIMIC-CXR
datasets.description: Chest X-ray dataset with radiology reports — 227,827 imaging studies from 64,588 patients. Requires PhysioNet credentialed access.
datasets.manual_instructions: Same PhysioNet credentialed access as MIMIC-IV. Download reports: https://physionet.org/files/mimic-cxr/2.0.0/mimic-cxr-reports.zip

datasets.name: OpenI
datasets.description: NLM Open-I chest X-ray dataset — 3,955 radiology reports with 7,470 chest X-rays. Fully public.

datasets.name: CheXpert
datasets.description: Stanford chest X-ray dataset — 224,316 chest radiographs with 14 disease labels. Requires Stanford registration.
datasets.manual_instructions: Register at https://stanfordmlgroup.github.io/competitions/chexpert/ → receive download link via email → download CheXpert-v1.0-small.zip → extract to data/datasets/chexpert/

datasets.name: PadChest
datasets.description: Multi-label chest X-ray dataset from Hospital San Juan — 160,868 images with 174 radiographic findings. Requires registration.
datasets.manual_instructions: Register at BIMCV portal → download PADCHEST_chest_x_ray_images_labels_160k_01.02.19.zip → extract to data/datasets/padchest/

datasets.name: NCBI Disease Corpus
datasets.description: Corpus of 793 PubMed abstracts with disease mention annotations — gold standard for biomedical NER evaluation.

datasets.name: BC5CDR
datasets.description: BioCreative V Chemical-Disease Relation corpus — 1,500 PubMed articles annotated with chemicals, diseases, and their relations.
datasets.manual_instructions: Register at BioCreative portal → Task BC5CDR → Download CDR_Data.zip → extract to data/datasets/bc5cdr/

datasets.name: DrugBank
datasets.description: Comprehensive drug database — 14,000+ drugs with targets, indications, interactions, and pharmacology. Requires free account.
datasets.manual_instructions: Register at https://go.drugbank.com/ → My Account → Downloads → Download drugbank_approved.xml.zip → extract to data/datasets/drugbank/

datasets.name: RxNorm
datasets.description: NLM clinical drug normalisation system — standard names and identifiers for millions of drugs. Free API available.

datasets.name: SIDER
datasets.description: Side effect resource — 1,430 drugs with 5,868 side effects extracted from package inserts. Publicly downloadable.

datasets.name: PubMed (E-utilities API)
datasets.description: 35+ million biomedical citations from MEDLINE with abstracts. Queryable via NCBI E-utilities API (no API key required for low volume).

datasets.name: PubMed Central (PMC)
datasets.description: Full-text open-access biomedical literature — 8+ million articles. PMC Open Access subset freely downloadable.

datasets.name: NHANES
datasets.description: National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey — continuous cross-sectional survey covering lab values, demographics, and disease prevalence.

datasets.name: Heart Disease (UCI)
datasets.description: UCI Heart Disease dataset — 303 patients, 13 features, binary classification target. Classic cardiovascular risk dataset.

datasets.name: Chronic Kidney Disease (UCI)
datasets.description: UCI CKD dataset — 400 instances with 24 features including creatinine, haemoglobin, specific gravity for CKD classification.

datasets.name: Pima Indians Diabetes
datasets.description: Diabetes prediction dataset — 768 female patients of Pima Indian heritage, 8 features (glucose, BMI, insulin, etc.), binary diabetes label.
